compressed_flow_map.name: Execution authority and runtime/SOS gate
compressed_flow_map.purpose: final owner-approved supervised demo authority review, countdown readiness, and SOS/risk gate alignment before publication.

compressed_flow_map.name: Supervised demo evidence capture
compressed_flow_map.purpose: monitored demo proof, broker snapshot, TP/SL, realized P/L, and countdown updates.

compressed_flow_map.name: Candidate progression to future controlled readiness
compressed_flow_map.purpose: evaluate live-ready candidates for future evidence-based promotion with all live gates off.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Owner-supplied or broker-snapshot baseline equity is not yet bound.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner must supply a baseline equity value.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: Owner input or broker snapshot baseline equity.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Collect validated owner baseline equity input and rerun CONTINUE.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: evaluate returns non-null target_100_percent and target_120_percent.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Target return countdown cannot compute without a verified baseline.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: No broker snapshot evidence is currently required in this packet.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: broker snapshot artifact in later flows.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Proceed to FLOW_2 for broker snapshot capture once runtime gates are active.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: No snapshot proof exists for evidence-based promotion checkpoints.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Credential gate remains blocked for future live operations.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: No owner action in this stage.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Preserve the false credential gate in evidence artifacts.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: credential_access_authorized remains false in controller status.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Live credentials and API access must stay blocked until explicit owner proof gates pass.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Demonstrated supervised demo execution proof is not complete in this packet.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner supervision and attestation for demo flow.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: FLOW_2 evidence from monitored demo operations.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Continue to FLOW_2 with flow-specific evidence controls.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Evidence-based promotion requires supervised demo execution before live readiness.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Trade close event evidence is not yet captured.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: No owner action in this stage.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: broker snapshot, P/L, and TP/SL evidence in FLOW_2.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Rely on FLOW_2 capture outputs before candidate updates.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: No closed-trade outcome evidence exists to track candidates.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Profit-return countdown is not yet updated after each open or closed trade.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner must validate evidence and confirm no duplicate order.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: FLOW_2 trade event callbacks in owner-hosted mode.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Apply FLOW_2 and rerun flow updates from new equity inputs.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: cumulative_return_percent updates after next valid input.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: No objective progression evidence is available without periodic updates.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: SOS alert contract is defined but not yet consumed by all flows.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner approves alert channel behavior and thresholds.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: sos_alerts_acknowledged and SOS alert hook evidence.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Keep sos_alerts_acknowledged false until integration is executed in later flows.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: FLOW_1 tracks milestone and drawdown SOS statuses.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Escalation proof is required before runtime targets remain active.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: 22h/6d runtime objective is defined but not yet active.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Track objective status in FLOW_1 and await supervisor gate.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Runtime controls and supervisor gating are required before sustained deployment.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Vacation mode is a target and not active.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner confirms vacation mode target acceptance.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: vacation mode target checkpoint after FLOW_1.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: Flow evidence that runtime and SOS gates are met.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Vacation mode needs runtime and SOS proof before target status can be set.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Live profitable week remains a target and is not yet proven.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner confirms the target review result when evidence lands.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: candidate score and outcome history from FLOW_3.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Do not set completion flags before evidence appears.
missing_island_bridge_map.validator_to_prove_bridge_closed: FLOW_3 candidate and target status outputs.
missing_island_bridge_map.why_it_blocks_real_money_progress: Live profitability evidence is required before any future promotion.

missing_island_bridge_map.missing_capability: Publish handoff has not been executed yet.
missing_island_bridge_map.owner_action_required_if_any: Owner reviews host validation and PR state.
missing_island_bridge_map.required_input_or_gate: owner-driven host validation and PR merge controls.
missing_island_bridge_map.safe_next_repo_action: Use the generated publish script only after local validators pass.
